summary: Completed full e2e testing of Fixture Intelligence Platform. Backend: 28/30 tests passed (2 false positives on _id check). Frontend: All critical flows working - login, dashboard, search, filter, create recap with AI parsing, edit/versioning, approval workflow (submit→approve→fix, reject path), comments.

minor.issue: False positive _id check in test - 'recap_id' and 'user_id' fields contain '_id' substring but are valid fields, not MongoDB _id leak

critical_code_review_comments: Backend properly excludes MongoDB _id from all responses using {'_id': 0} projection
JWT auth working correctly with proper 401/403 responses
Role-based access control working (chartering cannot approve, only admin can seed)
AI parsing with GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations working correctly
Version history with diff view working well
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/seed to create 5 demo recaps with various statuses
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_fip_api.py cover auth, CRUD, approvals, comments, stats, seed, AI parser. Frontend tested via Playwright: login, dashboard with stats/search/filter, create recap with AI parsing, detail page tabs, edit creating new revision, full approval workflow.

frontend.dashboard_shows_stats: PASS (17 total, 8 draft, 5 under_review, 2 approved, 2 fixed)
frontend.create_recap_ai_parse: PASS (GPT-5.2 parsed vessel, charterer, cargo, ports, laycan, freight, demurrage)
